pest_rice_yellow.title: Nitrogen deficiency in Rice
pest_rice_yellow.cause: Nitrogen deficiency or Tungro virus if spots are present.
pest_rice_yellow.solution: For nitrogen deficiency, apply urea fertilizer 40kg per acre. Ensure proper water management.

pest_tomato_blight.title: Tomato Early/Late Blight
pest_tomato_blight.cause: Fungal disease (Alternaria solani or Phytophthora infestans).
pest_tomato_blight.solution: Remove infected leaves. Apply copper-based fungicide spray every 7-10 days.

crop_wheat.title: Wheat Farming
crop_wheat.solution: Sow in winter (November). Needs loam soil. Requires 3-4 irrigations.

crop_cotton.title: Cotton Farming
crop_cotton.solution: Needs black soil. Maintain 6-8 pH. Beware of pink bollworm and whitefly.

fertilizer_urea.title: Urea Application
fertilizer_urea.solution: Apply urea in split doses. Avoid applying before heavy rain. Best applied directly to soil near plant bases.

fertilizer_npk.title: NPK Fertilizer
fertilizer_npk.solution: Apply NPK 19:19:19 during early growth stages. Switch to higher potassium formulas during fruiting/flowering.

irrigation_drip.title: Drip Irrigation
irrigation_drip.solution: Prefer drip irrigation to save 40-50% water. Run morning or late evening to minimize evaporation.

weather_rain.title: Rain Forecast
weather_rain.cause: What to do during heavy rain
weather_rain.solution: Ensure proper drainage in fields. Do not apply fertilizer to avoid runoff. Postpone spraying chemicals.

weather_drought.title: Drought Conditions
weather_drought.solution: Apply organic mulch to retain soil moisture. Irrigate only near the root zone.

pest_aphids.title: Aphid Infestation
pest_aphids.solution: Spray Neem oil (5ml/liter). For severe cases, use Imidacloprid.

pest_general.title: General Pest Control
pest_general.solution: Identify pest before spraying. Use Neem oil for organic farming. Use chemical pesticides as last resort.

crop_sugarcane.title: Sugarcane Advice
crop_sugarcane.solution: Needs high water. Soil should be well-drained. Watch out for red rot disease.

soil_ph.title: Soil pH Adjustment
soil_ph.solution: To increase pH (make less acidic), add agriculture lime. To lower pH (make more acidic), add agricultural sulfur or organic matter.

fallback.title: Agricultural Expert (Offline)
fallback.cause: Offline Mode / Query not perfectly matched.
fallback.solution: I am operating in offline mode. My knowledge is currently limited. Try asking about: 'rice yellow leaves', 'tomato blight', 'wheat', 'cotton', 'urea', 'irrigation', 'rain', 'aphids', or 'soil ph'.
